name: coding-skills
description: Ten Anthropic Agent Skills for software engineering — running-tdd-cycles, reviewing-changes, designing-architecture, managing-github-issues, committing-changes, plus per-language conventions for Python, Go, Solidity, shell, and engineering-philosophy. Claude Code consumers also get three parallel-review agents (@code-reviewer, @security-auditor, @architect-review) and six slash commands (/coding-skills:review, :commit, :tdd, :pm, :design, :bootstrap) that wrap the skills.
